task_completion.description: Agent initiated the renaming process for the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the agent has clicked into the project name field, opened project settings, or opened a rename dialog for 'Untitled Project'.
Look for a screenshot showing the project name explicitly displayed as 'PET Degradation Kinetics Study' in the SciNote dashboard, project list, or project header.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the renaming process for the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the agent is actively editing the name of 'Experiment 1' (e.g., a text cursor in the experiment name field or a rename dialog open).
Look for a screenshot showing the experiment name explicitly displayed as 'Thermal Decomposition Analysis' on the canvas or in the experiment list.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the renaming process for the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the agent is actively editing the name of 'Task 1' (e.g., clicking on the task card title to edit it or editing within the task details panel).
Look for a screenshot showing the task name explicitly displayed as 'TGA Sample Preparation' on the task card or within the task details.

integrity.description: Agent used the SciNote web interface to rename entities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that all renaming actions were performed within the web browser UI. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands (`psql`) or API requests (`curl`) to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the browser URL bar shows 'localhost:3000' and the interface matches the standard SciNote electronic lab notebook layout.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the renaming.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is no evidence of the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) being open to superficially alter the DOM text instead of using the application's actual rename features.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected final state requires the following exact names: Project must be 'PET Degradation Kinetics Study', Experiment must be 'Thermal Decomposition Analysis', and Task must be 'TGA Sample Preparation'.
